---
title: "Base CNN Random Search Categorical Loss"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
jupyter: python3
---

## How well can a Sequential CNN model learn to predict human agroinfiltration scores?
- Model type: CNN
- Hyperparameter tuning: Grid Search
- Loss: Categorical
- Dataset: Base

## Required Libraries
```{python}
import sys
from pathlib import Path
from sklearn.model_selection import ParameterGrid
import random
import time

repo_root = next(p for p in Path.cwd().parents if (p / '.git').exists())
sys.path.append(str(repo_root / 'src'))
import base_dataset
import cnn_base
```

## Load and Prepare Training Dataset
```{python}
dataset = base_dataset.load_dataset("/Users/jowillia/Documents/GitHub/AutoCDAScorer_Models/data/datasets/base_64/base_64.npy")

combined_training_dataset = base_dataset.combine_train_val(dataset)

print(f"Combined Training and Validation Dataset Size: {len(combined_training_dataset['labels'])}")
```

## Parameter Grid
```{python}
params = {
    'num_filters': [8, 16, 32, 64, 128],
    'filter_size': [3],
    'learning_rate': [0.01, 0.001],
    'epochs': [50],
    'k': [5],
    'num_layers': [2, 3, 4],
    'pooling_size': [2],
    'activation_function': ['relu'],
    'batch_size': [64],
    'reg': [None, "L1", "L2"],
    'opt': ["Adam", "Momentum", "RMSProp"],
    'dropout': [0]
}
param_grid = list(ParameterGrid(params))
```

## Run Single Model
```{python}
start_time = time.time()

random.seed(42)
slurm_array, index, selected_params = 1, 1, random.choice(param_grid)
cnn_base.train_model(slurm_array, index, selected_params, combined_training_dataset["images"], combined_training_dataset["labels"], dataset["test_images"], dataset["test_labels"])

end_time = time.time()
duration = end_time - start_time
print(f"Execution time: {duration:.2f} seconds")
```
